sentences.target: Le comte arrive au château aujourd'hui.

translations.fr: Le comte arrive au château aujourd'hui.
translations.en: The count arrives at the castle today.
translations.es: El conde llega al castillo hoy.
translations.de: Der Graf kommt heute am Schloss an.
translations.it: Il conte arriva al castello oggi.
translations.pt: O conde chega ao castelo hoje.
translations.vi: Bá tước đến lâu đài hôm nay.
translations.nl: De graaf arriveert vandaag bij het kasteel.
translations.hu: A gróf ma érkezik meg a kastélyba.
translations.hi: काउंट आज किले में पहुँचता है.
translations.el: Ο κόμης φτάνει σήμερα στο κάστρο.
translations.id: Sang bangsawan tiba di kastil hari ini.
translations.sv: Greven anländer till slottet i dag.
translations.da: Greven ankommer til slottet i dag.
translations.ja: 伯爵は今日城に到着します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the subject noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the sentence.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive ‘to arrive’.
Contraction of ‘à + le’; preposition marking location/direction; introduces ‘château’.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘au’.
Adverb of time modifying the verb ‘arrive’.

sentences.target: On parle d'un comte dans ce film.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ paʁl dœ̃ kɔ̃t dɑ̃ sə film/

translations.fr: On parle d'un comte dans ce film.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ paʁl dœ̃ kɔ̃t dɑ̃ sə film/
translations.en: We talk about a count in this movie.
translations.es: En esta película hablan de un conde.
translations.de: In diesem Film spricht man über einen Grafen.
translations.it: In questo film si parla di un conte.
translations.zh-Hans: 这部电影里谈到一位伯爵。
translations.yue: 呢套電影入面有講到一位伯爵。
translations.ru: В этом фильме говорят о графе.
translations.pt: Neste filme fala-se de um conde.
translations.vi: Trong bộ phim này, người ta nói về một bá tước.
translations.ar: في هذا الفيلم يتحدثون عن كونت.
translations.nl: In deze film wordt over een graaf gesproken.
translations.uk: У цьому фільмі говорять про графа.
translations.hu: Ebben a filmben egy grófról beszélnek.
translations.hi: इस फिल्म में एक काउंट के बारे में बात की जाती है.
translations.pl: W tym filmie mówi się o hrabim.
translations.el: Σε αυτήν την ταινία μιλάνε για έναν κόμη.
translations.nb: I denne filmen snakker de om en greve.
translations.id: Di film ini mereka membicarakan seorang bangsawan.
translations.sv: I den här filmen pratar man om en greve.
translations.ro: În acest film se vorbește despre un conte.
translations.cs: V tomto filmu se mluví o hraběti.
translations.da: I denne film taler man om en greve.
translations.ja: この映画では伯爵について語られている。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun; triggers 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive, takes a prepositional complement.
Preposition ‘de’ with elision before a vowel; marks ‘of/about’ relation with the following noun phrase.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner for ‘comte’.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of the preposition ‘de’.
Preposition introducing a location phrase.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies ‘film’.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘dans’.

sentences.target: Tu lis un roman sur un comte.
sentences.reading: /ty li œ̃ ʁɔmɑ̃ syʁ œ̃ kɔ̃t/

translations.fr: Tu lis un roman sur un comte.
translations.ipa: /ty li œ̃ ʁɔmɑ̃ syʁ œ̃ kɔ̃t/
translations.en: You are reading a novel about a count.
translations.es: Estás leyendo una novela sobre un conde.
translations.de: Du liest einen Roman über einen Grafen.
translations.it: Stai leggendo un romanzo su un conte.
translations.zh-Hans: 你在读一本关于伯爵的小说。
translations.yue: 你喺度睇一本關於伯爵嘅小說。
translations.pt: Você está lendo um romance sobre um conde.
translations.vi: Bạn đang đọc một cuốn tiểu thuyết về một bá tước.
translations.nl: Je leest een roman over een graaf.
translations.hi: तुम एक काउंट के बारे में उपन्यास पढ़ रहे हो.
translations.el: Διαβάζεις ένα μυθιστόρημα για έναν κόμη.
translations.nb: Du leser en roman om en greve.
translations.id: Kamu sedang membaca novel tentang seorang bangsawan.
translations.sv: Du läser en roman om en greve.
translations.ro: Citești un roman despre un conte.
translations.da: Du læser en roman om en greve.
translations.ja: あなたは伯爵についての小説を読んでいる。

tokens.explanation: Second-person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner for ‘roman’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘lis’.
Preposition meaning ‘about/on’; introduces the topic complement.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner for ‘comte’.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘sur’.

sentences.target: Il joue un comte au théâtre.

translations.fr: Il joue un comte au théâtre.
translations.en: He plays a count at the theater.
translations.es: Él interpreta a un conde en el teatro.
translations.de: Er spielt im Theater einen Grafen.
translations.it: Lui interpreta un conte a teatro.
translations.zh-Hans: 他在剧院扮演一位伯爵。
translations.yue: 佢喺劇院飾演一位伯爵。
translations.pt: Ele interpreta um conde no teatro.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đóng vai một bá tước ở nhà hát.
translations.ar: هو يؤدي دور كونت في المسرح.
translations.nl: Hij speelt een graaf in het theater.
translations.hi: वह थिएटर में एक काउंट का किरदार निभाता है.
translations.nb: Han spiller en greve på teatret.
translations.id: Dia memerankan seorang bangsawan di teater.
translations.sv: Han spelar en greve på teatern.
translations.ro: El joacă rolul unui conte la teatru.
translations.da: Han spiller en greve på teatret.
translations.ja: 彼は劇場で伯爵を演じる。

tokens.explanation: Third-person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; here ‘to play (a role)’.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner for ‘comte’.
Common noun; direct object of ‘joue’, referring to the role played.
Contraction of ‘à + le’; preposition indicating location (‘at the theatre’).
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘au’.
